title: Seminar event schema
description: Normalized record for events in the Seminar Schools calendar. Covers lectures, screenings, author readings, artist talks, panels, podcast recordings, religious-tradition scholar talks, and philosophy cafes that satisfy the four-condition test: known time and place, prepared offering by a designated participant, substantive engagement, real intellectual stake.

id.description: Stable identifier. SHA-1 hash of source_url plus ISO date, first 12 hex chars.

date.description: Event start time, ISO 8601 with timezone. Time may be approximate; date must be exact.

end_date.description: Event end time. Null when source does not provide.

title.description: Event title as published by the source. No editorial rewriting.

venue.description: Physical or virtual venue. Format: Venue Name plus address or platform when available.

source_url.description: Canonical URL of the event listing or detail page.

source_id.description: Short identifier of the source roster entry that produced this record. Matches an id in /scripts/sources.json.

type.description: Operation-type classification per the polymyth-broadened seminar test. Original four-condition types: lecture, screening, reading, artist-talk, panel, podcast-live, scholar-talk, philosophy-cafe, gathering. Polymyth-extension types: festival-of-form (cultural festivals enacting non-institutional forms of life), cultural-reproduction (diasporic and community festivals reproducing form-of-life outside dominant order), site-specific-art (festival-scale artistic practice operating outside gallery/commercial circuits, e.g. CONTACT Photography). Drives display label and filtering.

speaker_or_director.description: Named speaker, author, artist, director, panel members, or host. Null when not yet confirmed.

attendance_confirmed.description: For screenings: director confirmed in attendance. For other types: named speaker confirmed (vs tentative). Default false until verified.

confidence.description: Verification confidence 0-100. Threshold for auto-publish lives in /scripts/scrape_seminars.py config (default 70). Below threshold routes to review queue.

four_condition_test.description: Pass/fail per condition from the seminar-shape test. Filled by LLM verification pass.

raw_excerpt.description: Short verbatim excerpt from the source listing for verification trace. Max 500 chars.

scraped_at.description: When this record was last fetched and verified.

review_status.description: Where this record lives. auto-published = live feed. queued = review queue at /data/seminars-review.json. rejected = excluded after manual review. manual = hand-curated by Saul, scraper does not overwrite.

marginalia_url.description: After-attendance commentary link if a /marginalia/ piece exists for this event. Null until written.

parent_id.description: If set, this record is a child event inside a parent festival record. Value is the parent's id. Display layer groups children under parent. Parent records leave this null.

is_parent_festival.description: True when this record represents the umbrella festival itself (with date range spanning the whole festival). False or omitted for one-off events including child events within a festival.
